title: Grubhub Normalized Menu
description: A PosNormalizedMenu structure for the Grubhub Menu API containing schedules, sections, items, modifiers, and pricing. Each object has an external_id used for diff-based ingestion.

merchant_id.description: The Grubhub merchant identifier this menu belongs to.

schedules.description: Top-level menu schedules defining what items are available during specific time periods.

MenuSchedule.description: A schedule defining availability windows and menu sections available during those periods.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier assigned by the partner for diff-based menu ingestion.

name.description: The display name of the schedule.

availability.description: Time windows when this schedule is active.

sections.description: Menu sections available during this schedule.

Availability.description: A time window defining when a schedule is available.

day_of_week.description: The day of the week this availability applies to.

start_time.description: The start time in HH:mm format.

end_time.description: The end time in HH:mm format.

MenuSection.description: A grouping of menu items such as appetizers, entrees, or desserts.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier for diff-based ingestion.

name.description: The display name of the section.

MenuItem.description: An individual menu item that a diner can order.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier for diff-based ingestion.

name.description: The display name of the menu item.

description.description: A description of the menu item.

price.description: The base price of the menu item.

available.description: Whether this item is currently available for ordering.

modifier_prompts.description: Modifier prompts allowing customization of this item.

SizePrompt.description: A size selection prompt. Sizes can affect the price of the item and its modifiers.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier for this size prompt.

name.description: The display name for the size prompt.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier for this size option.

name.description: The display name of the size option.

price.description: The price adjustment for selecting this size.

ModifierPrompt.description: A modifier prompt allowing customization such as dressing choice or toppings.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier for this modifier prompt.

name.description: The display name of the modifier prompt.

required.description: Whether a selection is required from this modifier prompt.

external_id.description: A unique external identifier for this modifier option.

name.description: The display name of the modifier option.

price.description: The additional price for selecting this modifier.

available.description: Whether this modifier option is currently available.
